name: PRSM Network Detection Bot
description: Detects anomalies on PRSM smart contracts: unauthorized mints/burns, role escalation, rapid registration spam, royalty distribution anomalies, settlement-challenge spikes, escrow drain attempts, and supply-cap proximity. Per Exploit Response Playbook Phase 1 (Detect).
longDescription: PRSM is a peer-to-peer protocol for distributed AI compute, storage, and data with on-chain creator royalties. This bot monitors the protocol's deployed contracts on Base mainnet and Sepolia testnet for behaviors that match known smart-contract exploit patterns or deviate from normal protocol operation. Findings emit to the Forta network with structured metadata enabling Foundation council triage per published playbook. See https://github.com/prsm-network/PRSM/blob/main/docs/security/EXPLOIT_RESPONSE_PLAYBOOK.md
